$comment: learn: draft a kb/pitfalls entry for a recurring error class (surfaced by `mine_runs`) and add it to the KB - the generative half of the self-improvement loop. generate -> write -> done | fix -> rewrite -> done | fail. The oracle (write_pitfall) is structural well-formedness (an H1 title + a ```go example). Grounded on the existing pitfalls (house style) + stdlib. Run: `ratchet flow . learn "<error class / trap>"`.
summary: Draft a kb/pitfalls entry for a recurring Go failure class (from mine_runs) and add it to the knowledge base - the self-improvement loop.
